title: CockpitEvent
description: One NDJSON line emitted by `generacy cockpit watch` per detected issue/PR transition. See spec.md Q2 for field semantics.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the watcher detected the transition (not the GitHub event timestamp).

kind.description: Whether the subject is a GitHub issue or pull request.

number.description: Issue or PR number on GitHub.

from.description: Curated CockpitState before the transition. Null if no prior state was known (rare; only on first observation that closes out).

to.description: Curated CockpitState after the transition. Null if the subject was deleted/removed.

sourceLabel.description: The label that drove the new state, or null for non-label events (issue-closed, pr-merged, pr-closed, pr-checks).

url.description: Full https URL of the issue or PR on github.com.

event.description: Discriminator for consumers that branch on event type.

labels.description: Full label set on the subject at transition time.
